title: Inventory Management, Storage, Cold Chain & Supply Chain
description: This course covers the full pharmaceutical supply chain from manufacturer to patient, with particular attention to the challenges unique to island-based pharmacy practice: irregular shipping, tropical climate storage, and cold chain requirements.
what_youll_learn: Apply FEFO and FIFO stock rotation to minimise pharmaceutical waste from expiry
Manage cold chain storage for temperature-sensitive medications in tropical conditions
Maintain controlled substance stock registers and perform reconciliation audits
Calculate reorder points and economic order quantities for a community pharmacy
Identify and manage pharmaceutical shortages using alternative sourcing strategies
